title: Convert a full kanban card to PDF
excerpt:
Hello, 
I’m wondering whether there is a way for me to convert a single kanban card to a PDF-file. Each Kanban card serves as checklist for a series of performed tests which our products have to go through before leaving…

posts.author: Anders_Wagenblast (Anders A. Wagenblast)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m wondering whether there is a way for me to convert a single kanban card to a PDF-file. Each Kanban card serves as checklist for a series of performed tests which our products have to go through before leaving the factory (FAT-test). However, I haven’t managed to find a way where one can fold out a single card in it’s full length and convert that into a PDF-report, which then could be sent upon request. Each card refers to a specific order, with a specific product system. Does anybody know how to achieve this and whether there is something available at this time like an app?
Any help on how to tacle this issue is highly appreciated. On beforehand thank you!

posts.author: DascroTech (Dascro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Anders,

One way I can think of is to store the card in google drive and apply some automations for creating a pdf and saving the pdf in drive for sending it later.

Hopefully it helps you ,

  • Dascro

posts.author: Anders_Wagenblast (Anders A. Wagenblast)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for taking the time to reply to this post, and for your suggestions.
In the meantime however, I have found a way that seems to do the trick, but if it turns out to be insufficient, I might reconsider and try out your suggestion.

Best Regards,

Anders
